title: <div>Alone, as the blood of my brothers was quickly diluted with the blood fraug
content: Alone, as the blood of my brothers was quickly diluted with the blood fraught by this new war. Alone, I knew which not was enemy nor foe, so I struck all who came close enough to be struck. Alone. Ten thousand. Until there were but six. All alone.
context: From document: Forced to flee I fled the fatherland for a further land to father… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
